title: narcissus longispathus subsp. alcaracensis
intro: Narcissus longispathus subsp. alcaracensis, also known as the Alcaraz narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Narcissus, which is a type of bulbous perennial. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus longispathus subsp. alcaracensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory congestion, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
